title: rhodorhiza scoparia
intro: Rhodorhiza scoparia, also known as Chinese goldthread, is a plant species that belongs to the family Saxifragaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese goldthread include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Chinese goldthread is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
